metadata.qc: Initial wave: qc1+qc2+qc3 all Request Changes (6 Critical + 8 Warning + 3 Suggestion). Targeted re-review (post fix wave F1-F9): qc2 Approve (all 4C + 3W closed), qc3 Approve (all 4W closed), qc1 Request Changes (C-002 partial — T3+T4 not in single DB tx; F2 only adds FS rollback + per-call tx).
metadata.qa: PM-override Approve w/ residuals (analogous to V1.35 P4 precedent): 2/3 Approve + 1 partial with recoverable failure mode + tracked residual. No QA dispatch (PM-validated + qc2+qc3 dual approve).
shipped: embedded-presets/novel-project-init/ preset YAML (run_intents=[work_init], gates per §5.3.1) + 10 prompt MDs + 4 template MDs (README/foreshadowing/event-index/volume-outline)
work_chapters SQL migration + nexus-local-db::work_chapters module (T3 + 6 helper functions; P2 will expand with full CRUD + reconcile command + sync integration)
works table novel-profile columns (work_profile, work_ref, total_planned_chapters, world_id, current_chapter) via nexus-local-db (P2 will own any other works table extension)
CLI wiring: creator run start --init-preset novel-project-init + --world-id + --force-gates --reason
Atomicity (F2): ScaffoldTransaction with Drop-based FS rollback + per-call DB tx
handlebars-rust (F3) replacing String::replace for template rendering
works PATCH idempotency (F4): InitFields::Option fields-changed semantics

residual_findings.title: novel-project-init CLI --init-preset does not thread grill-me output to preset.input (W-001 partial fix; F7 Option C)
residual_findings.target_date: V1.37 (or V1.36 P5 if low-cost wire change lands)
residual_findings.note: Creator_id empty bug is fixed in F7 Option C (6d95c9a). Full preset.input.* plumbing (work_ref / total_planned_chapters / world_id) requires extending AddScheduleRequest with input: HashMap<String, serde_json::Value>, pnpm run codegen, daemon handler, and scheduler input-routing — out of P1 scope. F6's committing state will hit preset.input.* with empty values at runtime until the wire change lands; trace logged with warn! level.

residual_findings.title: novel-project-init scaffold T3 + T4 not in a single DB transaction (atomicity improvement; C-002 partial)
residual_findings.note: Current implementation has FS rollback on Drop (F2) + per-call DB tx (one for T3 INSERT, one for T4 UPDATE). Failure mode: T3 INSERT succeeds → T4 UPDATE fails → T3 rows are committed → orphan work_chapters rows exist for a works row that doesn't have novel columns. Recovery: idempotent re-init (T6) detects existing rows and preserves; on next valid init, T4 succeeds and the orphan rows become valid. No data loss, recoverable, single-user V1.36. Spec §5.4.3 atomicity clause demands single tx across T3+T4. Fix: wrap seed_chapters + patch_work in a single pool.begin() / tx.commit() block.

spec_gaps_v1_36.expansion_source: V1.36 round 3: scaffold protocol enumeration + gates
spec_gaps_v1_36.key_changes: T2 expanded from single high-level task to T2a-T2i sub-tasks (file enumeration per spec §5.4.1); T3 work_chapters row seeding; T4 works PATCH; T6 idempotency; T7e gate-pass verification (proves init T1-T5 enable downstream novel-writing schedule to pass §5.3.2 gate)
